hooks.command:
cd "C:/SJ/antigravity/habitchatbot" && git checkout main 2>&1 && git pull origin main 2>&1 && MERGED=$(git branch --merged main | grep -v '^\* \|  main$') && if [ -n "$MERGED" ]; then echo "$MERGED" | xargs git branch -d && REMOTE_DEL=$(echo "$MERGED" | tr '
' ' ') && git push origin --delete $REMOTE_DEL 2>/dev/null || true && MSG="[정리] 브랜치 삭제: $MERGED"; else MSG="[정리] 삭제할 브랜치 없음"; fi && STASHES=$(git stash list) && STASH_MSG=$([ -n "$STASHES" ] && echo "
[Stash] $STASHES" || echo "
[Stash] 없음") && echo "{"systemMessage": "✅ 작업 정리 완료\n$MSG$STASH_MSG"}"
